sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6095" key="a)mfitanu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιτανύω</orth>, <sense id="n6095.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμφιτείνω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg004.perseus-grc1:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Merc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope> </bibl> (tm.).</sense> </entryFree>
